events.name: CHANGE
events.description: Direct callback emitted on every change. Stays as the Storybook / non-trait contract; trait-driven schemas should prefer the bus events below.

events.name: ADD
events.description: Event emitted when a tag is added: `UI:{addEvent}` with payload `{ tag: string, value: string[] }`.

events.name: REMOVE
events.description: Event emitted when a tag is removed: `UI:{removeEvent}` with payload `{ tag: string, index: number, value: string[] }`.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Add Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when a tag is added: `UI:{addEvent}` with payload `{ tag: string, value: string[] }`.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Class Name
overridableConfigKeys.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the outer container.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Helper Text
overridableConfigKeys.description: Helper text rendered under the input.

overridableConfigKeys.label: On Change
overridableConfigKeys.description: Direct callback emitted on every change. Stays as the Storybook / non-trait contract; trait-driven schemas should prefer the bus events below.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Placeholder
overridableConfigKeys.description: Placeholder for the entry input. Default: `'Type and press Enter…'`.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Remove Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when a tag is removed: `UI:{removeEvent}` with payload `{ tag: string, index: number, value: string[] }`.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Variant
overridableConfigKeys.description: Variant applied to each chip Badge. Default: `'default'`.
